title: Remover, Acid Activated, For Amine-Cured Epoxy Coating Systems
authors: AMS J Aircraft Maintenance Chemicals and Materials Committee
author_string: AMS J Aircraft Maintenance Chemicals and Materials Committee
abstract:
<div class="section abstract">


<div class="htmlview paragraph">This specification covers the requirements for removers used on amine-cured epoxy coating systems (see <span class="xref">6.1</span>).</div></div>
